BustBlockedSaveResponse.description: Typed blocked-save response for bust create/update operations. Used when a request is valid but persistence cannot proceed.

reason.description: Canonical blocked-save reason code for deterministic client handling.

retryable.description: True only when retrying later may succeed without request shape changes.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

message.description: Human-readable summary of why persistence was blocked.

BustBlockedSaveResponse.title: bust-blocked-save-response

BustDescriptor.description: Normalized character bust descriptor for SW-15. Character-scoped: applies to playable-character and NPC records. schemaVersion is always sw-15-m1-v1 for this contract baseline.

apparelAccent.description: Apparel accent preset domain. Use none when no accent is applied.

faceShape.description: Face shape preset domain. All values are constrained enums; unknown values are hard validation rejects.

facialHair.description: Facial hair preset domain. Use none when no facial hair is applied.

presetVersion.description: Identifies the preset version used as the customization baseline for this bust record.

scar.description: Scar preset domain. Use none when no scar is applied.

schemaVersion.description: Contract baseline version. Hard-pinned to sw-15-m1-v1. Any other value is a hard validation reject.

tattoo.description: Tattoo preset domain. Use none when no tattoo is applied.

BustDescriptor.title: bust-descriptor

BustValidationErrorResponse.description: Hard-reject validation error response for invalid bust descriptor payloads. Invalid bust payloads are never silently corrected; they are always hard-rejected with explicit per-field diagnostics.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the validation failure.

success.description: Always false for validation error responses.

validationErrors.description: One entry per invalid field. At least one error is always present on a hard-reject response.

field.description: Dot-notation path to the invalid field (e.g. descriptor.faceShape).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the value was rejected (e.g. not a valid enum value).

rejectedValue.description: The exact value that was rejected. May be any JSON type.

BustValidationErrorResponse.title: bust-validation-error-response

CatalogItemDefinition.description: Canonical catalog item definition returned by /items. Catalog entries are keyed by itemType and may omit runtime instance id.
CatalogItemDefinition.title: catalog-item-definition

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

distanceKm.description: Required only for radius queries. Omit together with positionKm for whole-system listing mode.

positionKm.description: Required only for radius queries. Omit together with distanceKm for whole-system listing mode.

celestialBody.description: Canonical celestial body payload, with distanceKm added for radius queries.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

celestialBody.description: Complete canonical celestial body payload. When id is present, the server upserts by id. When id is omitted, the server derives a deterministic id from sourceScanId, createdByCharacterId, and missionId for mission-generated bodies.

composition.description: Asteroid material profile. Required unless state is unscanned.

externalObjectDescriptor.description: Optional SW-13 canonical descriptor attached to the celestial body for external-object presentation identity.

observability.description: Required observability state for the body.

state.description: Canonical celestial body state. Composition may be omitted only when state is unscanned.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

celestialBody.description: Present on successful celestial body upsert responses.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.
Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.
Echo of the request correlationId.

CharacterBustCreateRequest.description: Request to create a bust descriptor for a playable character. characterId identifies the character record that will own this bust. Invalid descriptor field values are hard-rejected.

characterId.description: Identifies the playable character whose bust is being created.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

descriptor.description: Bust customization input. All domain fields are required. presetVersion declares the preset baseline used.

CharacterBustCreateRequest.title: character-bust-create-request

CharacterBustCreateResponse.description: Response after creating a playable-character bust descriptor. Returns either the normalized stored descriptor on success or a typed blocked-save payload when persistence is prevented.

characterId.description: The character whose bust was created.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

descriptor.description: The normalized stored bust descriptor including server-assigned schemaVersion.

CharacterBustCreateResponse.title: character-bust-create-response

CharacterBustReadRequest.description: Request to read the current bust descriptor for a playable character.

characterId.description: Identifies the playable character whose bust is being read.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

CharacterBustReadRequest.title: character-bust-read-request

CharacterBustReadResponse.description: Response containing the current stored bust descriptor for a playable character.

characterId.description: The character whose bust was read.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

CharacterBustReadResponse.title: character-bust-read-response

CharacterBustUpdateRequest.description: Request to update the bust descriptor for a playable character. The full descriptor must be provided; partial updates are not supported. Invalid field values are hard-rejected.

characterId.description: Identifies the playable character whose bust is being updated.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

descriptor.description: Full bust customization update. All domain fields are required. presetVersion must be provided.

CharacterBustUpdateRequest.title: character-bust-update-request

CharacterBustUpdateResponse.description: Response after updating a playable-character bust descriptor. Returns either the normalized stored descriptor on success or a typed blocked-save payload when persistence is prevented.

characterId.description: The character whose bust was updated.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

descriptor.description: The normalized stored bust descriptor after the update.

CharacterBustUpdateResponse.title: character-bust-update-response

items.description: Character summary snapshot. Only id and characterName are guaranteed; additional canonical fields may be present.

descriptorId.description: Stable identifier for descriptor content references and fixture assertions.

displayLabel.description: Human-readable label for diagnostics and optional UI overlays.

domain.description: Top-level object domain used by selection and downstream rendering adapters.

emissiveProfile.description: Emissive cue profile for readability under motion and darkness.

factionCue.description: Faction identity cue for silhouette context and narrative-aligned presentation.

fallbackTier.description: Deterministic fallback tier reference for balanced-performance profile handling.

materialProfile.description: Material treatment category to keep rendering semantics explicit.

objectFamily.description: Canonical family taxonomy value for stable visual identity selection.

roleCue.description: Role identity cue consumed by selectors and telemetry for readability decisions.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned contract version for baseline lock and drift detection.

silhouetteProfile.description: Distance-safe silhouette cue for at-a-glance recognition.

descriptors.description: Deterministic descriptor inventory sorted by descriptorId for selector-stable consumption with bounded family bundle size.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned descriptor payload contract version for SW-13 M0-M2 family payloads.

approachCue.description: Navigation approach cue used to maintain unmistakable gate approach semantics.

approachWindowKm.description: Window bounds for cue-stable approach behavior.

hazardCue.description: Approach hazard cue for navigation decision support.

landmarkFraming.description: Camera-facing framing cue used for long-range landmark readability.

navBeaconCue.description: Beacon rhythm cue used by navigation-facing approach overlays.

recommendedStandOffKm.description: Recommended standoff distance before committing to the gate approach corridor.

warningEscalation.description: Mandatory warning escalation policy for route-smoke evidence and approach UX assertions.

gates.description: Deterministic gate landmark inventory sorted by descriptor descriptorId with bounded canonical gate family count.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned SW-13 schema version for jump gate landmark payloads.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.
Echo of the request correlationId.

Item.description: Canonical item payload for runtime item records. For catalog definitions returned by /items, use CatalogItemDefinition. Client-facing material requirements are defined only by fabrication.requiredMaterials[].itemType.

examples.description: Pressure-rated sealing sleeves for rerouting damaged ship conduits and stabilizing subsystem junctions.

requiredMaterials.description: Canonical material requirements for crafting/comparison. Clients should use requiredMaterials[].itemType values for lookups.

ownership.description: Canonical ownership discriminator. When provided, ownerType is authoritative.

Item.title: item

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

item.description: Item create or partial update payload. For existing items, omitted fields preserve stored values. Explicit null clears item.container, item.spatial, or item.motion when those properties are present.

container.description: Optional container patch. Provide null to clear the container association.

motion.description: Optional motion patch. Provide null to clear motion state.

ownership.description: Canonical ownership discriminator. When provided, validated strictly: only player-character allowed, playerId must match actor.

spatial.description: Canonical spatial position. Provide null to clear spatial state. The legacy item.kinematics field is not accepted.

state.description: Canonical item state. Setting state to destroyed causes the server to populate destroyedAt if it is not already set.

tier.description: Optional item tier. When omitted, the server preserves the existing value for updates or applies the canonical default for creates.

requestIdentity.description: Identity block echoed by the backend so clients can demultiplex concurrent responses safely.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

item.description: Present on successful item upsert responses.

requestIdentity.description: Echo of the requestIdentity block from the request.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

hotkey.description: Launch slot hotkey. Must be one of the supported launch hotkeys 1 through 5.

itemType.description: Expected persisted item type for the launched item. Must match the stored item record.

requestIdentity.description: Identity block echoed by the backend so clients can demultiplex concurrent responses safely.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

requestIdentity.description: Echo of the requestIdentity block from the request.

yieldedItems.description: Yielded items from target-destroyed launches are deployed debris with canonical spatial coordinates and motion vectors.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

itemId.description: Catalog or market inventory item id. The server normalizes matching case-insensitively.

quantity.description: Requested buy quantity. Must be a positive integer.

requestId.description: Optional caller correlation id echoed in the response.

transactionId.description: Optional caller-supplied transaction id. If omitted, the server creates one.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

reason.description: Stable machine-readable failure reason when success is false.

requestId.description: Echoed caller correlation id when one was provided on the request.

transaction.description: Present on successful market buy responses.

itemId.description: Catalog or market inventory item id to sell. The server normalizes matching case-insensitively.

quantity.description: Requested sell quantity. Must be a positive integer.

requestId.description: Optional caller correlation id echoed in the response.

transactionId.description: Optional caller-supplied transaction id. If omitted, the server creates one.

requestIdentity.description: Client-supplied identity block that is echoed unchanged in every emitted list-missions-response.

correlationId.description: Exact echo of the request correlationId for the originating list-missions-request.

requestIdentity.description: Exact echo (deep-equal) of the full requestIdentity object supplied in the request, including additional properties when present.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

missionId.description: Canonical mission id. Must be one of the mission ids known to the server mission catalog.

NpcBustCreateRequest.description: Request to create a bust descriptor for an NPC. Generates the bust from a deterministicSeed with optional admin-tool overrides for specific fields. The deterministicSeed drives the baseline descriptor; overrides apply on top. Invalid field values in overrides are hard-rejected.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

deterministicSeed.description: Seed string used to deterministically generate the NPC bust baseline. Same seed always produces the same descriptor. Must be non-empty.

npcId.description: Identifies the NPC record this bust belongs to.

overrides.description: Optional admin-tool manual overrides for specific descriptor fields. Only provided fields are overridden; all others are derived from the deterministicSeed.

presetVersion.description: Optional preset version override. If omitted the server assigns a canonical preset version.

NpcBustCreateRequest.title: npc-bust-create-request

NpcBustCreateResponse.description: Response after creating an NPC bust descriptor. Returns either the normalized stored descriptor on success or a typed blocked-save payload when persistence is prevented.

appliedOverrides.description: List of field names that were overridden by admin-tool input rather than derived from the deterministicSeed.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

descriptor.description: The normalized stored bust descriptor including server-assigned schemaVersion and any applied overrides.

deterministicSeed.description: The seed used to generate the NPC bust baseline. Stored for replay and cross-session consistency verification.

npcId.description: The NPC record this bust belongs to.

NpcBustCreateResponse.title: npc-bust-create-response

NpcBustReadRequest.description: Request to read the current stored bust descriptor for an NPC.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

npcId.description: Identifies the NPC whose bust is being read.

NpcBustReadRequest.title: npc-bust-read-request

NpcBustReadResponse.description: Response containing the current stored bust descriptor for an NPC, including the deterministicSeed used at creation.

appliedOverrides.description: List of field names that were overridden by admin-tool input at creation or update time.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

deterministicSeed.description: The seed used to generate this NPC bust at creation. Included in read responses for replay and consistency verification.

npcId.description: The NPC whose bust was read.

NpcBustReadResponse.title: npc-bust-read-response

NpcBustUpdateRequest.description: Request to update an NPC bust descriptor. A new deterministicSeed may be provided to regenerate the baseline, or only overrides may be changed. Invalid field values in overrides are hard-rejected.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

deterministicSeed.description: Updated seed for the NPC bust baseline. Must match the original seed unless intentionally re-seeding.

npcId.description: Identifies the NPC whose bust is being updated.

overrides.description: Optional admin-tool overrides. Replaces any previously stored overrides for the specified fields.

presetVersion.description: Optional preset version. If omitted the server retains the existing presetVersion.

NpcBustUpdateRequest.title: npc-bust-update-request

NpcBustUpdateResponse.description: Response after updating an NPC bust descriptor. Returns either the normalized stored descriptor on success or a typed blocked-save payload when persistence is prevented.

appliedOverrides.description: List of field names currently overridden by admin-tool input after this update.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

descriptor.description: The normalized stored bust descriptor after the update.

deterministicSeed.description: The seed in effect after the update.

npcId.description: The NPC whose bust was updated.

NpcBustUpdateResponse.title: npc-bust-update-response

createdAt.description: Ship creation timestamp when available. May be an empty string for legacy or synthesized ship records.

driveProfile.description: Present only when the ship has a valid normalized drive profile.

ships.description: Present on INVALID_SESSION responses for compatibility with shared error payload shape.

correlationId.description: Client-generated UUID v4 used to correlate each request/response pair.

ship.description: Partial ship patch object. Nested patch intent is determined by property presence. When ship.inventory is present, the server applies the provided inventory patch. When ship.inventory is omitted, the server preserves existing ship inventory references.

damageProfile.description: Optional damage profile patch. Presence indicates patch intent for damage profile fields.

inventory.description: Optional inventory patch for the target ship. Presence indicates patch intent; omission preserves the current ship inventory references. Entries may be canonical ShipItem rows (`id`, `itemType`, `displayName`), compact references (`itemId`, `itemType`), or hydrated rows (`id`, `itemType`).

ownership.description: Optional ownership patch. Presence indicates ownership transfer/update intent.

correlationId.description: Echo of the request correlationId.

ship.description: Present on successful ship upsert responses.
